overview.description: The Invesco BulletShares 2035 Municipal Bond ETF (BSMZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of US investment-grade AMT-Free municipal bonds that mature by the end of 2035. BSMZ was launched on Sep 17, 2025 and is issued by Invesco.
